titleStmt.title: SII 36.249: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 249. (A.R. No. 249 of 1910.) NARASIṄGAPURAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall of the Nāchchiyār shrine in the Narasimha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: Gift of tax free land by the Ūrār of Madurāntaka-nallūr in Kaṉṟūrnāḍu, a subdivision of Maṇayiṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, for providing sacred food offerings to the deities Perumāḷ, Pirāṭṭi and Iḷaiyāḻvār in the temple of Madurāntaka-Viṇṇagar Āḻvār in the village. The supply of sacred food offering to the deity was entrusted to the servants of the temple (dēva-kaṉmikaḷ).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
....svastiśrī pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari yakaḻcūḻpuviyiṟ poṉ nemiyaḷavun=tanemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai yiḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāṟ putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyīṭṭam vayirākattu vāriyayilmuṉaik kuntaḷavaraiyar tan=taṉamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittu toḷvali kāṭṭip porppari naṭāttik kīrttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit ten=ticai
t temarukamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭai nannilappāvai tanimaiyun=tavirntup punitaṟṟiru maṇimakuṭamurimaiyiṟ cūṭittaṭiyiraṇṭun=taṭamuṭiyākat tonnila ven=tar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai yirunilaviḷākameṅkaṇun=taṉātu tirunila veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutaṉi meruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟīpān=tarattup pūvartiṟai viṭu tantakalañ corikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vi
laṅkiya tennavaṉ karun=talai parun=talaittiṭat tan pon karipuṟattiṭaik kiṭappa Iṉnāṭpiṟ kulappiṟai pol niṟpiḻaiyennuñ colletir koṭā veḻkulattaracar Aḷattiyiṟpaṭṭa kaḷiṟṟintiṭṭamuṅ kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇṇūr naṭuvenat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavu meṅkanum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭatanmānamuṅ kūṟinavīramum naṭappa veṟinmalaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻin=ta natikaḷuñ cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻun=ta kaṭalkaḷun=talaivirittalamara kuṭa ticait tan nāḷukātu tānun=ten
ttāṉaiyum pannāḷiṭṭa palapala mutukum payattetir māṟiya jayapperun=tiruvum pakaḻiyukan=tu koṭutta pukaḻincilviyum vāḷāvoṇkaṇ maṭan=tayarīṭṭamu mīḷātu koṭutta veṅkatir nilāvuṅ kaṅka maṇṭalamuñ ciṅkaṇavennum paraṇi yiraṇṭum Ōrvicai kaik koṇṭīṇṭiya pukaḻoṭum pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅ koḷḷa tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷa varu parittaraṅkamum poruparikka vārayumuṭaittāyvan=tuvaṭakaṭal tenkaṭalpaṭarvatu polat tan peruñ ceṉai ppañcavaraivarup poruta po
rkaḷattañci Araṇenappukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vaṉacarar tiriyum poṟṟaveñcuṟameṟik koṟṟa vijayastampanticaitoṟum niṟutti muttincalāpamu muttamiṭpotiyinum matta veṅkari paṭumaiyyaṟacaiyyaḻuṅka kaik koṇṭaruḷi tenṉāṭṭellai kāṭṭi malai ñāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellān=taṉivicumpeṟa māveṟiya tanavarutanit talaivaraik kulakalar kulaiya neṟi toṟu nilaikaḷiṭṭaru
ḷip poṅkoḷiyāramun=tiruppuyattalaṅkalum pol vīramun=tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pār toḻac civaniṭattumeyenat tiyākavalli Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷiruppa yavaḷuṭan kaṅkai vīṟṟirun=teṟamaṅkayar tilatam Ēḻicaivallapi Ēḻulakamuṭaiyāḷiruppa vāḻiyum Avaṉi muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu vīrasimhāsanattu vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya ko rājakecaripanmarāṉa cakkiravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu muppattu nālāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu
maṇayiṟ koṭṭattuk kanṟūr nāṭṭu maturān=taka nallūr Ūrom Eṅkaḷūr śrī maturān=taka viṇṇakarāḻvāṉ koyilil tiruvārātaṉai koṇṭaruḷukiṟa perumāḷukkum pirāṭṭiyārkkum Iḷaiyāḻvāṉukkum Amutu ceytaruḷa Ucciyampotu san=ti Onṟukkup perumāḷukkut tiruvamutaruci nānāḻiyum pirāṭṭiyāṟkkut tiruvamutarici Irunāḻiyum Iḷayāḻvānukkut tiruvamutarici Iru nāḻiyum Āka Arici kuṟuṇikku
iraṇṭañcākki nāḷ Oṉṟukku nellup patakku nā nāḻiyum kaṟiyamutu Iraṇṭukku nellu Iru nāḻiyum neyyamutu Āḻākkukku nel nānāḻiyum tayiramutu nāḻikku nel nāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamutu veṟuṅkāy Eṭṭukkum veṟṟilai muppattiraṇṭukku nel nāḻiyum Āka nāḷ Onṟukku nel mukkuṟuṇi nānāḻikkum tiruvamutupaṭiyāka nāṅkaḷ Iṟayili viṭṭa nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷūrt tiripuvanamātevip pe vaṭa kaṭayil viṭṭile
ttattukku kīḻpāṟkellai ciṟṟāyar putūr Ūrmeṭṭukku meṟkun tenpāṟkellai veḷḷerikkum kīḻaippunnai Ēttattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai pilāvettattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai karuppacceṟuvukkum vanniceṟuvukkut teṟkum Inān kellai Ūrum Akappaṭṭa nilamum Innum melai māvettattukku kīḻpāṟkellai kīḻai māvettattukku meṟku tenpāṟkellai Āvik kālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai kīḻai vañci Ēttattukku
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai pilāyettattukku teṟkum Innānkellai Uḷḷuyakappaṭṭa nilamum Āka Ēttam Iraṇṭukkum peciṉanta perellai Ūrumakappaṭṭa nilam viḻal veṭṭiyun=tiruttiyum koṇṭu Ittevar tevakanmikaḷē cantirātittavaraiyuṅ kaik koṇṭu mippaṭi Amutu ceyvikka kaṭavarkaḷākavum Innilañcuṭṭi nāṅkaḷ Eccoṟṟuk kūṟṟunellu veṭṭi muṭṭaiyāḷuḷḷiṭṭu maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭana yātonṟum koḷḷavuṅ kāṭṭavum peṟātomākavum Innilañcuṭṭi Aḻivu ceyvān keṅkekkuṅ
kumarikkum naṭuvupaṭṭa pāvakana mākkaḷ ceyta pāvattaip paṭuvanākavum Ipparicu tevakanmikaḷ Itte rāki kaṭavaṉ Ippaṭi Amutu ceyvikkak kaṭavarkaḷāka sammātaṅ koṇṭu Ittevarkaḷukku Innilam Iṟayiliyāka Aṟavolai cetu kuṭuttom maturān=taka nallūr Ūrārum Ippaṭi kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik koḷak kaṭavarkaḷāka sammatittu lakcaṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom maturān=taka nallūr Ūrom Ippaṭikkuk karaṇattān teṭiyamāneti Eḻuttu ....ippaṭikku maturān=taka viḻupparaya
n Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kuṟumuṭicaṅkankāḻi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Iruṅkaṇūr kiḻavan rājacun=taran vayiramekan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Iruṅkaṇūr kiḻavan mātevan kaliyarucallāmuṭayān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kumārantaka cerananti Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku paiyana yarimātevan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku pāṭalaṅkiḻavan tevantiran Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkuc ceyavampatak kiḻān tāḻimalai mātevaṭikaḷ Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 36.249 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
